title: Griffin and Jones: Slapdash Magic
full_description: Griffin and Jones — the Pioneers of Slapdash Magic — combine sleight of hand, cons, crazy inventions, and stunts in a fast-paced, hilarious show. Whether playfully coercing you into one of their ridiculous games, demonstrating a harebrained invention, or trying to flog you their miracle snake-oil, the energy remains high, the laughs come thick and fast, and the magic is genuinely jaw-dropping. Grand finale: a straitjacket escape turned into a wrestling match. Once described as 'a punk rock Morecambe and Wise'.
ai_summary: Griffin and Jones are the Pioneers of Slapdash Magic — pure comedic energy, bonkers inventions, and audience participation that ends in genuine jaw-dropping tricks, finishing with a straitjacket escape staged as a wrestling bout.
